entry.title: New IDC SS001760016 awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION for the amount of $500,000

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CL::IGF MULTIPLE AWARD 10 YEAR, BASE AND OPTIONS, INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY CONTRACT FOR INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SUPPORT SERVICES TO ASSIST THE AGENCY OFFICE OF THE DEPUTY COMMISSIONER, SYSTEMS IN ITS EFFORTS TO PERFORM WORK REQUIRED TO ENSURE THAT ONGOING SUPPORT TO THE AGENCY PROGRAMMATIC, ADMINISTRATIVE, AND MANAGEMENT INFORMATION SYSTEMS NEEDS ARE MET.
ORDERING PERIOD, INCLUSIVE OF ALL OPTIONS, IF EXERCISED, IS AUGUST 21, 2017 THROUGH SEPTEMBER 28, 2026.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC SS001760016 (P00001) awarded to LEIDOS INNOVATIONS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0
